headlineLabel: In 2009, Twitter made What’s happening? the pulse of digital communities. In 2014, Slack brought the same pulse inside the organization. In 2026, Human Conversation doesn’t get between us—it brings us together.
headlineText: 200920142026twitterDigital communitiesWhat’s happening?Twitter made one question the pulse of digital communities.twitterNov 19 · 2009What’s happening?slackThe organizationWhat’s happening?Slack brought the same pulse inside the organization.slack# general# product# random2026 · Real-world social communitiesHuman Conversationdoesn’t get between us —it brings us together.
storyMarkers: Human Conversation is the only place where connection, and human, social, and community data flows.
